summary: Ukrainian forces used an FPV drone to kill an armed Russian guard and free captured soldiers in an operation supported by other defense units. Russian operators with the "Rubicon" Center destroyed Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and personnel in the Donbas and Krasny Liman directions on March 30, 2026, with 100 total targets eliminated. The Russian "Yolka" interceptor drone was used multiple times to destroy Ukrainian strike drones, including in the Kherson region and a Russian border region, with kinetic interceptions causing warhead detonations. Ukrainian soldiers in the Kostiantynivka direction detected an incoming Russian FPV drone using a drone detector, allowing them to survive the attack.
